zh.lifeSummary: 當William Cecil 2nd Earl of Salisbury KG PC於1591年3月28日出生在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特時，他的父親Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury27歲，母親Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury30歲。他於1608年12月1日與Catherine Howard Countess of Salisbury在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1668年12月3日在英國賀特福爾哈特菲爾德享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾哈特菲爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Cecil 2nd Earl of Salisbury KG PC于1591年3月28日出生在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特时，他的父亲Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury27岁，母亲Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury30岁。他于1608年12月1日与Catherine Howard Countess of Salisbury在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1668年12月3日在英国賀特福爾哈特菲爾德享年77岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾哈特菲爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Cecil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Monmouthshire): from the Old Welsh personal name Seisyllt, sometimes wrongly said to derive from the Latin name Caecilius (see Sisley ). The most frequent modern spelling is a Renaissance attempt to connect the surname with Caecilius in the English pronunciation of its time. The Welsh name is more probably, but not definitely, from the Latin name Sextilius, a derivative of sextus ‘sixth’.

History: The great and powerful English Cecil family first came to prominence with David Cecil, a Monmouthshire gentleman who espoused the cause of Henry Tudor and came to court in London after the latter became king in 1485. His grandson William Cecil, Lord Burghley (1520–98), was Elizabeth I's chief adviser for 40 years, and his descendants have remained politically powerful and culturally influential in Britain ever since. They were originally minor Welsh gentry; their name is found in a variety of forms, including Sitsylt, Ceyssel, and Sisseld.

variants.name: Cissell
meanings: English (Middlesex): variant of Welsh   Cecil  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Sisley
meanings: English (Kent): from the popular Middle English female personal name Sisely (Old French Cecile, Cicile, from Latin Caecilia, feminine form of the Roman surname Caecilius, a derivative of caecus ‘blind’). This was the name of a early Christian virgin martyr of the 2nd or 3rd century, who came to be regarded as the patron saint of music. The surname is generally spelt with C- in the Middle Ages, following the trend of the personal name, and with S- in modern times. Compare Cecil and see also Sise , Sisson .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Cecil 2nd Earl of Salisbury KG PC was born on 28 March 1591, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, his father, Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury, was 30. He married Catherine Howard Countess of Salisbury on 1 December 1608, in Westminster, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 3 December 1668, in Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Cecil 2nd Earl of Salisbury KG PC est né le 28 mars 1591, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Howard Countess of Salisbury le 1 décembre 1608, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 3 décembre 1668, à Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Cecil 2nd Earl of Salisbury KG PC am 28. März 1591 in Westminster, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury 30. Er hat am 1. Dezember 1608 in Westminster, Middlesex, England Catherine Howard Countess of Salisbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Dezember 1668 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: William Cecil 2nd Earl of Salisbury KG PCが1591年3月28日にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターで生まれた時，父Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisburyは27歳，母Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisburyは30歳であった。1608年12月1日にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターでCatherine Howard Countess of Salisburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1668年12月3日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハトフィールドで77歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハトフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.Westminster Abbey, London, Middlesex, En: 미국 미시간 주 먼로 런던 타운시프 런던
ko.lifeSummary: William Cecil 2nd Earl of Salisbury KG PC(이)가 1591년 3월 28일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1608년 12월 1일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 Catherine Howard Countess of Salisbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1668년 12월 3일 영국 허트퍼드실르 하트필드에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 하트필드에 묻혔다.

pt.28 March 1591–3 December 1668: 28 de março de 1591–3 de dezembro de 1668
pt.St Clement Danes, Westminster, Middlesex: St Clement Danes, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Westminster Abbey, London, Middlesex, En: London, London Township, Monroe, Michigan, Estados Unidos da América

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Cecil 2nd Earl of Salisbury KG PC nasceu em 28 de março de 1591, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Howard Countess of Salisbury em 1 de dezembro de 1608, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de dezembro de 1668, em Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Cecil 2nd Earl of Salisbury KG PC родился 28 марта 1591 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Howard Countess of Salisbury 1 декабря 1608 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 3 декабря 1668 г. в местности хатфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности хатфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Cecil 2nd Earl of Salisbury KG PC nació el 28 de marzo de 1591, en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Catherine Howard Countess of Salisbury el 1 de diciembre de 1608, en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 3 de diciembre de 1668, en Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
